{#- Override of ablog/postnavy.html: emit the same HTML as the doc footer's prev/next, so a single CSS styles both. -#} {% set post = ablog[pagename] %} {% if post.published and ablog.post_show_prev_next and (post.prev or post.next) %}
{%- if post.prev %} Previous {%- endif %} {%- if post.next %} Next {%- endif %}
{% endif %}
